march_2026_public_offering.use_of_proceeds: Clinical trials, working capital, general corporate purposes
march_2026_public_offering.note: Manual extraction from March 4, 2026 424B5 final prospectus supplement

december_2025_private_placement.beneficial_ownership_blocker: 4.99% or 9.99% (inferred from NYSE Minimum Price compliance)
december_2025_private_placement.investors: Accredited investors including a Company director
december_2025_private_placement.note: Referenced in March 4, 2026 424B5 as prior financing. Separate offering from March 2026 public offering.

shares_outstanding.note: March 2, 2026 baseline includes December 2025 private placement shares

warrants_outstanding.note: Includes December 2025 warrants (1,233,488 at $1.36) and prior warrant issuances

fully_diluted_estimate.methodology: Basic shares + all options + all warrants + reserved shares
assumptions: All reserved shares under 2021 Plan are issued
Low case assumes no overallotment exercise
High case assumes full 3M share overallotment exercise
limitations: Does not include potential future ATM offerings
Does not include future equity plan grants from reserved shares
Does not include potential future warrant issuances

beneficial_ownership_13d_13g.note: No Schedule 13D or 13G filings found for MAIA. Absence does not prove absence of significant institutional investment - beneficial ownership blockers (4.99%/9.99%) are designed to keep investors below the 5% disclosure threshold.

institutional_13f.status: Not integrated - infrastructure available but InfoTable XML parsing required
limitations: 13F InfoTable XML parsing not yet integrated into project
Integration requires fetching 13F-HR filings from institutional managers
CUSIP identifier not extracted (would improve match confidence)
Only managers with $100M+ AUM must file 13F
Positions <10,000 shares or <$200,000 may be excluded
institutional_13f.recommendation: Future enhancement should add InfoTable XML parsing to sec_13f_parser.py and create end-to-end matcher workflow

form_144.note: No Form 144 filings found for MAIA. Original CP23A report accession 0001959173-24-000374 was erroneous. No insider sale notices during review period.

hidden_institutional_ownership_mechanism: Beneficial ownership blockers at 4.99% or 9.99% keep investors below 5% 13D/13G threshold
Pre-funded warrants (none in March 2026 offering but may exist from prior offerings) economically equivalent to common stock but structured as warrants
13F reporting lag of 4-5 months (quarter-end + 45 days) delays visibility
13D/13G 5% threshold allows significant positions at 2-4% to remain invisible
Private placements like December 2025 offering have limited investor disclosure
Warrants attached to private placement shares provide economic exposure beyond disclosed share ownership
December 2025 offering mentioned 'healthcare-dedicated investors' without naming them

corrections_made: Separated March 2026 public offering (20M shares at $1.50) from December 2025 private placement (1.2M shares at $1.224)
Corrected gross/net proceeds: $30M gross, $28M net (base) or $32.3M net (with overallotment)
Fixed malformed comma placeholders: March 2026 offering had 0 pre-funded warrants, 0 common warrants
Calculated numeric fully diluted estimate: 85.0M to 88.0M shares (low/high case)
Corrected Form 144 status: 0 filings found (original accession was erroneous)
Explained 13F limitation: Infrastructure available but InfoTable XML parsing not integrated
Added detailed breakdown of options by plan (12.5M total across 3 plans)
Added detailed warrant breakdown (13.1M outstanding at $1.92 weighted-average)
Added December 2025 private placement as separate offering event

filings_manually_reviewed.purpose: Primary source for March 2026 offering details, share counts, options, warrants
Preliminary prospectus (pricing table blank, not used for final data)

limitations: Manual extraction subject to human interpretation of filing language
Data as of March 4, 2026 - subsequent events may have occurred
Does not include real-time market data or stock prices
Does not incorporate third-party data or analyst estimates
13F coverage requires InfoTable XML parsing integration
Hidden institutional positions below reporting thresholds not visible
In-the-money warrant analysis requires current stock price
